pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Rafe, The Noisemaker, is somehow on top — beginner's luck or secret genius?** Man, Rafe's sittin' pretty at the top of the table with 9 points, and I can't tell if that's beginner's luck or if the kid's pullin' some sorcery with his science class predictions. Devin's right on his heels, just one point shy—it's like Ghost Pepper's tryin' to sneak into Rafe's lead like he’s slidin’ into the DM’s. Meanwhile, Gayden "The Backpass Assassin" needs to quit passin' the buck and start backin’ himself more than he's backpassin'. He's got England, and lettin' Zach's "Mustard Boy" get cooked down at 3 points is not the move. Poor Zach's out here with Brazil but still actin' like Saudi oil's gonna buy him goals — bruh, the fantasy World Cup ain't got transfer windows. As for Gunner, aka "Bubba G," not even DR Congo's divine intervention can save him from sittin' fourth, just puttin’ in work with that one match win over Senegal like it’s his latest mixtape. The standings might shake up soon, but you know how the game goes — it's all about who brings the grind every day.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Non-Qualifying Picks Inspire New FIFA Rules Committee
pundit_takes.subtitle: Impressive leadership from the kid who drafted the invisible team.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's DR Congo Poised for Portugal Showdown
pundit_takes.subtitle: 'They'll give it 110 percent,’ says Gunner, against heavy odds.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Ghana Prepared for Panama Match
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach confident as he eyes a chance to escape the basement.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden Braces For England's Test Against Croatia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Backpass Assassin hopes for a goal or two this time.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach's still on a winning drought—there's more action in his trophy cabinet.
Rafe's Tier-1 Germany saves him from his draft-day disasterpiece.
Gayden schools Rafe—grounded at the dinner table with a -3 differential.
The sim missed big: 15-year-old Rafe's winning while Gunner bleeds favorite status.
